string 2: Unh...
Inori?!
Inori!
Ngh... Mnh...
Where are we?

What happened to us? That gate was pulling me in, and next
thing I knew...

Is this a sewer line? That's the closest thing I can think of, but...
Hey, where's Minervamon?
First, let's find a way out.{next}
You aren't hurt, are you?
Is this another anomalous phenomenon?
Good idea. We might figure something out once we get out of here.
Let's start looking.
Oh—I'm fine. But I have no idea what's going on.
Honestly, I don't have the slightest clue.
It looks like this leads outside.
Inori, wait here! I'll go check it out first!
Ngh...
Whoa!
Wow... Amazing...
Are all of these...
...Digimon?
Wait... Is this...

...the place Minervamon mentioned—the world
where Digimon live?!
We made it! We're actually in the Digital World!

Agent {player}... I overheard that just now.
You're in the world of Digimon? Am I hearing you right?

If so... this is amazing! Stupendous! Absolutely fantastic!
What else can I say?
Now, now. Take it easy.{next}
We're in the middle of a mission.{next}
Amazing! Stupendous! Absolutely fantastic!{next}

Most anomalies are of unknown origin... But some start to
make sense if alternate worlds and dimensions come into play.

Wandering into a fantastical realm, encountering
unreal beings... Almost like you're Alice herself.

This discovery alone guarantees your promotion in ADAMAS.
If you make it back safe and sound, that is...

Unraveling the mysteries behind phase electron life forms
will reveal the truth of our world, and the Inferno.

A rift appeared atop the government building during the 
Inferno. If it was connected to the world you're in now...

...then, in theory, it's very likely that collecting data
in the Digital World could prevent world destruction.

This is becoming the most important mission in ADAMAS history.
Gather as much info as you can. The future depends on it.
Hey! You, there!
Aven't seen you folks before. Why not take a look at my wares?
Wow... I've never seen anything like this before.

You sure haven't! I mean, there are so many thugs 
outside town these days, right?

And... rumor has it the Titans are moving back in, too. 
Better stock up here and be ready for anything!
Whoa! There are big buildings in this world, too!
Aegiomon... You look so happy.
You bet! After all...
...I don't have to wear that hoodie here to hide who I am.
That's true. I didn't think of that.

This place is similar to our world in some ways,
but so different in others...
We'd better do a thorough investigation.{next}
It seems they have a distinctive society and culture.{next}
I'm gonna put work on hold. Let's do some sightseeing.{next}
Yep. That seems to be the best plan of action.
Yeah... Digimon are leading their own, rich lives here...
Sightseeing? You sure you got your priorities straight...?

We don't know a thing about this world.
Let's walk around and get a feel for the place.
Who would've imagined an entire society and culture built by Digimon?

But you can't just stand around staring, I suppose. And
sightseeing is completely out of the question.

The apocalyptic scenario set in motion by the Shinjuku
Inferno isn't slowing down one bit in this timeline.

There might not be much time left for us to communicate
like this.
We never know which conversation will be our last.
So send me any information you get, no matter how trivial.
It just might lead to saving this world.
...I'll hurry on with the investigation, then.{next}

Well, well! What do we have here? I've never seen
Digimon like you before, certainly.
We're not Digimon.{next}
We're human.{next}
Regulations demand I keep my identity secret.{next}
Is that so? Then, what are you, pray tell?

Human? You don't say... We only ever see your kind
on very rare occasions.
Apparently, they wander into our world every now and again.
I-Is that so? You certainly are an odd one...
You have a completely different sort of aura about you.
Welp, all good!

Many gather here from all over to offer their services
as warriors under Merukimon!

Feel free to stay a bit! No idea if you're warriors...
...Or whatever you are.
You, there! Halt!
Identify yourselves!
We're friends of Minervamon.{next}
We're humans investigating anomalous phenomena.
We're Digimon.
Is that true? I have never seen your kind before...

In any case, I shall NOT LET YOU PASS!
LEAVE AT ONCE!

What? Human, you say? I have heard rumors
of your existence...

...but there have been no reports of any humans
entering Central Town.
I must insist you leave at once!
What?! Is that really true?!
But wait... You are not to be trusted.
If it is indeed true, you must bring me proof.
It IS true. I am that proof.

L-Lady Minervamon! P-Pardon my insolence!
Please, come right through!

Lord Merukimon has been very preoccupied
of late with the security of this town.

But my liege will be happy to see you, I am sure.
Right this way!

I'm analyzing the data you sent over, and I'm honestly
at a loss for words.

Especially about the rich diversity and varied 
characteristics of all the Digimon there!

The data you sent matches many of the entries in ADAMAS's
cryptid database of unidentified mysterious animals.

That means the Digimon in that world are in all
likelihood closely related to the cryptids.

Although still a working theory, we now believe most of the
anomalies we've been dealing with stem from Digimon...

...and that Digimon are connected to the Shinjuku
Inferno as well.

However, we'll need more data to make it conclusive.
Keep gathering what you can.
Wow. So this is the Digital World.
Yeah. It's all just one surprise after another.
But...
What is it, Inori?
How are we ever going to get back to our world...?

Minervamon came to Shinjuku from here. There must be a 
way to travel between the two worlds.

We have to find Minervamon and ask, so we can figure all 
this out!
Shut up, you little jerks!
Whatever, ya wimp!
Wimp! And Minervamon's a wimp, too!
What?! What part of Minnie is wimpy in any way?!
J-Just ignore them, Coronamon!
Anyone who's friends with a wimp is also a wimp! Wimp!
Yeah! That's right!
What did you say?!

If ya ain't a big ol' fraidy-cat, then come with us! I'm gonna
nick PlatinumNumemon's jewelry down in the sewers!
Yeah, Big Bro! You're so cool!
Follow us if ya think ya can handle it, ya big WIMP!
I dare you to call me that one more time!
I'm no coward! And I'll prove it to you!

What?! No, Coronamon! Minerva told us not to go down into
the underground!
Well, there he goes... What do I do now?!
*sigh* Now what am I supposed to do...?
What's the matter?{next}
I feel like we've met somewhere before...{next}
[Pretend not to notice.]{end}
Everything's the matter! That darn Coronamon!
Huh? Are you... human?
Huh? Have we?
Hey, aren't you human?
Wait. No way...! You're that egg thief from before!
What are you doing here...?
Do you know where Minervamon is?{next}
I'm not an egg thief.
Who were those noisy little kids?

That's what I'd like to know! Minerva was supposed to have
gone to your world!
Hold on. You were with Minerva, but got separated, you say?
Oh, yeah. You're right.

It was all that strange shadow's fault, the shadow that YOU
came in with, to be exact.
But wait a minute... What are you doing in the Digital World?
Oh, I almost forgot! Coronamon is in trouble!

The Bearmon Brothers egged Coronamon into going against
Minnie's orders! Again!
I've got to do something, and fast!
Agh! So much is happening all at once, my head's gonna explode~!
B-But hold on. I'd better calm down and sort everything out...

You got separated from Minnie and don't know
how to get back to your world.

Coronamon went down into the sewers—even though they're
supposed to be off-limits—and might be in trouble.
What kind of trouble?{next}
Helping people in need is my job!{next}
I still just wanna go sightseeing...{next}

I know it's sudden, but could you please do me a favor? 
You're the only ones I can ask...!

Could you please stop Coronamon and drag him out of the sewers?
I'd do it myself but I'm useless in a fight...
In return, I'll go try and find Minnie for you.

You're hoping to ask how you can get home, right?
If I can find her, I'll bring her to you guys right away!
Okay, it's a deal.{next}
Can you please explain that all again?
We should look for Minervamon first!
Thank you! The sewers are this way. Follow me!

I'll look for Minerva because I know this town well, and you'll
go stop Coronamon because you can hold your own in a fight.

After all, I haven't forgotten how you got rid of that shadow
at the temple for us.

All right, then. I'll show you the way to the sewers. Come
on!

If Minerva is in town, it'd be better for me to look for her
since I know my way around.
In the meantime, please stop Coronamon!
Those kids! They shouldn't have gone in...
Hm? You folks want to go in, too?

If you do plan on going in, you'd better be prepared to
encounter many unfriendly Digimon.

The enemies down there are weak against fire, so you should
bring allies that are good at using it.

They sell Skill Discs at Gawappamon's store, so why don't
you stop by before moving on?
